case_title: S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. VS. LUIS PEREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-04-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF A TOTAL OF $360.13 IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $50.00. FIRST PAYMENT JANUARY 31,2012. THEREAFTER MONTHLY PAYMENTS DUE ON OR BEFORE THE LAST DAY OF THE MONTH. SCHEDULE FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT AS NECESSARY", PER JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF.
